risks.description: CRITICAL: cli.py imports ReviewSession from alpha_omega.review (line 232), but alpha_omega/review.py is NOT included in this diff. Either the file is missing, uncommitted, or this is incomplete work. Code will fail on import.

CRITICAL: Massive scope (41 files, 4198 additions) makes thorough review nearly impossible. High-risk changes buried in volume: new memory system, review system, implement command, security-sensitive git operations.
HIGH: Zero test coverage for major new features. No tests for: review command, implement command, memory.py (343 lines), git operations in context_builder.py, session ledger, claim/lock files.

HIGH: Git command injection vector. Branch names and file paths from user input passed to subprocess without validation. Example: context_builder.py _run_git() and _diff_args_for_scope() use user-supplied branch names directly.

HIGH: Silent error masking. _run_git() returns empty string on ALL failures (timeout, invalid branch, not a git repo). Users see 'No changes to review' instead of actual error. No stderr capture or logging.

MEDIUM: State corruption scenarios unhandled. Stale lock files (.alpha-omega/sessions/*.lock.json), partial index writes (memory_index.json), corrupted session JSON - no recovery mechanisms or validation.

MEDIUM: Breaking change without migration. Renaming core/ to alpha_omega/ and changing from script to package breaks existing installs. No migration guide, deprecation warning, or backward compat shim.

MEDIUM: Hardcoded timeouts insufficient for large repos. 30s git timeout (context_builder.py:218), 120s brain timeout may fail on real-world scale. TimeoutExpired not handled separately from other exceptions.
LOW: Untracked files invisible to review. 'ao review' (unstaged scope) uses only git diff, which excludes new untracked files. New source files won't be reviewed until git add.
LOW: Mixed language normalization missing. memory.py search and contradictions detection on corpus mixing Russian and English text, but no language-aware tokenization or normalization specified.

missing_tests: Integration test: full ao review flow (unstaged, staged, branch scopes)
Unit tests for git error handling: invalid branch, non-git directory, timeout
Security tests: branch name injection, path traversal via git diff output
Memory system tests: index rebuild, corruption recovery, multilingual search
Session ledger tests: lock file acquisition, stale lock cleanup, concurrent access
alpha_summary: Major architectural upgrade with critical missing pieces (review.py not in diff) and zero test coverage for extensive new functionality. Git operations have security and error-handling gaps. Scope too large for safe single-PR merge.
